Friend,

This Special Election is going to be all about turnout, and I have bad news. _We're behind on our Get Out The Vote (GOTV) fundraising goal._

Friend, I know we have the support of a majority of Montanans, but our work is not done yet. We must make sure all Team Gianforte supporters either mail in their Absentee Ballots or vote in person on Thursday, May 25th - less than 3 days from today.

A well-executed GOTV program usually means the difference between victory or defeat. Will you help us reach out to our voters in the final days of this Special Election?

name: Eric Greitens
subject: back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri,
body:
We are fighting to bring more jobs to the people of Missouri. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42420996:sYUUP72qN:m:1:1531626645:1058FFC7FF5CEDE3175104A88121D0A8:r)
---

Peter,

We promised we would shake things up and get things done - that we would fight hard for you. And that's exactly what we've done.

In just a few months, we signed "Right-to-Work" legislation, imposed the strongest restrictions in Missouri history on lobbyists' gifts to the executive branch, and attracted hundreds of jobs to the state of Missouri.

While we are off to a great start, Peter - we still have work to do.

**[TELL LAWMAKERS TO GET BACK TO WORK! >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42420996:sYUUP72qN:m:1:1531626645:1058FFC7FF5CEDE3175104A88121D0A8:r)**

That's why I have called lawmakers back for a special session. We must pass the Steel Mill Bill and bring hundreds of jobs back to Southeast Missouri!
_"We are fighting to bring more jobs to the people of Missouri. Some career politicians failed to do their jobs and then went home.**That's wrong.** We're canceling their summer vacations and calling a special session to get this done."_
Peter, are you with me?
**[TELL LAWMAKERS TO GET BACK TO WORK! >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42420996:sYUUP72qN:m:1:1531626645:1058FFC7FF5CEDE3175104A88121D0A8:r)**
I am urging lawmakers to bring back good-paying quality jobs for families in Missouri! Missourians believe in the values of hard work and personal responsibility - and they are ready to get to work.

Making real, lasting, conservative change will take strong leadership - but it doesn't start or end with just one person. We will need to work together, Peter!

**[TELL LAWMAKERS TO GET BACK TO WORK! >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42420996:sYUUP72qN:m:1:1531626645:1058FFC7FF5CEDE3175104A88121D0A8:r)**

Stay tuned for an update on the progress we've made during this special session.

Yours in service,

Eric Greitens
Governor of Missouri

**[TELL LAWMAKERS TO GET BACK TO WORK! >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42420996:sYUUP72qN:m:1:1531626645:1058FFC7FF5CEDE3175104A88121D0A8:r)**

| Paid for by Greitens for Missouri,
Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

name: The White House
subject: President Trump's Taxpayer First Budget
body:
| | President Trump's Taxpayer First Budget. |[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be557e54c42297d82d26728e51adc65c1990eec3deacf5cdc710de705a6a8cb54725774489b5c4a18761693d0b1d3785b5)**President Trump's first proposed budget shows respect for the people who pay the bills.** The administration's proposal reverses the damaging trends from previous administrations by putting our nation's budget back into balance and reducing our debt through fiscally conservative principles, all the while delivering on President Trump's campaign promise not to cut Social Security retirement or Medicare. The budget's combination of regulatory, tax, and welfare reforms will provide opportunities for economic growth and creation. [Get the facts about President Trump's budget](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be557e54c42297d82d26728e51adc65c1990eec3deacf5cdc710de705a6a8cb54725774489b5c4a18761693d0b1d3785b5).
# **Balance & Cutting Spending**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be557e54c42297d82d26728e51adc65c1990eec3deacf5cdc710de705a6a8cb54725774489b5c4a18761693d0b1d3785b5) Unlike any budget proposed by the previous administration, the Fiscal Year 2018 Budget **achieves balance within the 10-year budget window** and begins to reduce the national debt within that same window. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be557e54c42297d82d26728e51adc65c1990eec3deacf5cdc710de705a6a8cb54725774489b5c4a18761693d0b1d3785b5) The policies in this Budget will drive down spending and grow the economy. By 2027, when the budget reaches balance, **publicly held debt will be reduced to less than 60 percent of GDP,** the lowest level since 2010.
# **No Cuts to Medicare & Social Security**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be557e54c42297d82d26728e51adc65c1990eec3deacf5cdc710de705a6a8cb54725774489b5c4a18761693d0b1d3785b5) The President's Budget **does not cut core Social Security benefits.** And the President is fulfilling his presidential campaign promise **not to cut Medicare benefits.**
# **Saving Taxpayers Money**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be557e54c42297d82d26728e51adc65c1990eec3deacf5cdc710de705a6a8cb54725774489b5c4a18761693d0b1d3785b5) President Trump's budget **saves the American people billions of dollars** through welfare, tax, and regulatory reform.
# **Supporting Our Military**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be557e54c42297d82d26728e51adc65c1990eec3deacf5cdc710de705a6a8cb54725774489b5c4a18761693d0b1d3785b5) The President is requesting **$54 billion,** or 10 percent, more than the defense level President Obama signed into law for both the 2017 CR and the 2018 budget cap. This increase balances the need to rebuild the military with the need for disciplined, strategy-driven, executable growth.
# **Keeping Americans Safe**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be557e54c42297d82d26728e51adc65c1990eec3deacf5cdc710de705a6a8cb54725774489b5c4a18761693d0b1d3785b5) The Budget includes **over $2.6 billion** in new infrastructure and technology investments in 2018 to give CBP frontline law enforcement officers the tools and technologies they need to **deter, deny, identify, track, and resolve illegal activity along the border.**
# **Putting American Families First**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be557e54c42297d82d26728e51adc65c1990eec3deacf5cdc710de705a6a8cb54725774489b5c4a18761693d0b1d3785b5) President Trump's budget provides national **paid family leave for the first time** in the history of this country. **Find out more** information about President Trump's Taxpayer First Budget at [WhiteHouse.gov/taxpayers-first](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be557e54c42297d82d26728e51adc65c1990eec3deacf5cdc710de705a6a8cb54725774489b5c4a18761693d0b1d3785b5).
---

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be3400afe5545a1f0f63e6180f0d09efbf59bde08e46607033a38903bf279071df5e89566db846fb98809d5cc8a3bc695a) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e71c045fa3a981be041de962d85e25ddfbcf46f8dde580004a62633c8e0bf45245f7c49ddaede61a1bfeeff4367c2ec1d7a8ea052ac08eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d416d4dafb369315aa3bea03d74ded7180cd1b7c60620e5ccf224b77f828255e375ebcd4287b1d2d39f71662ad83ee5036)

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: A debate in our party
body:
#
Friends -
There is a debate in our party right now about whether or not we as Democrats should talk to working-class white voters or double down on our base. **And let me tell y 'all, it is asinine.**
The truth is we ought to be talking to working-class black voters, working-class white voters, working-class Latino voters, all working class voters.
Our opportunity for a victory here in Florida isn't hidden in some specific demographic that we need to target, but rather in demonstrating to all Floridians that we have the best plan to move our state forward. Our strategy is to not only go speak in all 67 counties in Florida -- it's to listen in all 67 counties, too.
[**Will you help us build a movement that reaches every corner of Florida by contributing $20.18 to our campaign right now?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3328/9e00690/4b3f71e3/24037726/1557447687/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170523-resenddebate")
Now, this kind of strategy means there will be times when we're campaigning in towns that haven't gone blue once in my lifetime. **But whether we 're speaking with folks in a small town up in the Panhandle, or a big city down in South Florida, I can promise you that our message will be the same.**
We're going to talk about the need to create jobs on every rung of the income ladder, so that every Floridian can get a job that doesn't require them to have three jobs. About finally giving teachers the pay raise they deserve, and getting rid of the high stakes testing that leaves our kids sick to their stomachs with anxiety. About protecting Planned Parenthood and expanding access to health care. About fulfilling the promise that we are ALL created equal, no matter our race, religion, creed, ability, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, or what's in our bank account.
We're not going to water down our message or compromise our progressive principles based on some superficial differences. And we don't need to -- because these ideas aren't just appealing in communities like the one I grew up in. These ideas are appealing in any community where there are folks who believe we need to level the playing field, provide better job and education opportunities, treat our neighbors with more kindness and compassion, and rebuild this state into a better place for all of us.
[**Help us fund our movement to reach voters across the state, regardless of their background, by contributing $20.18 to our campaign today.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3328/9e00690/4b3f71e3/24037726/1557447687/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170523-resenddebate")
Together, we will build the kind of campaign that the entire state can be proud of, that stands up for every Floridian, that gives hope to every person and every family regardless of their background. **Together, we will build a campaign that will win back the Governor 's Mansion after more than 20 long years.**
Bring it home,
Andrew

**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3328/9e00690/4b3f71e3/24037726/1557447687/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170523-resenddebate")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3328/9e00690/4b3f71e3/24037739/1557447687/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3328/9e00690/4b3f71e3/24037738/1557447687/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3328/9e00690/4b3f71e3/2403773b/1557447687/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: Trump's attack on Medicaid (add your name)
body:
Stand with Democrats against Trump's new budget.
---
**Donald Trump's budget is a direct assault on working Americans. Add your name to tell Congress to reject it:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Defeat-the-Trump-Budget1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170523_tp_nd&source=em_20170523_tp_nd")**

Friend --

On June 16th, 2015, in front of a crowd of supporters, Donald Trump proclaimed: "Save Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security without cuts. Have to do it."

But today, nearly two years later, the truth rears its ugly head. Under Donald Trump's proposed budget, $800 billion will be stripped from Medicaid, which could cut off benefits for about 10 million Americans.

Donald Trump's budget breaks his promise to the people who voted for him and betrays working people, senior citizens, people with disabilities, and young people.

Tens of millions of Americans who rely on Medicaid and other programs slated for the chopping block will suffer under the Trump plan, and all so Donald can cut taxes for millionaires and billionaires -- and himself.

**Budgets are moral documents, but Donald's proposal is simply immoral. We all need to stand together against it before Republicans in Congress try to write it into law. Add your voice right now:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Defeat-the-Trump-Budget1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170523_tp_nd&source=em_20170523_tp_nd")**
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

clean_body: Stand with Democrats against Trump's new budget. Donald Trump's budget is a direct assault on working Americans. Add your name to tell Congress to reject it: "" Friend -- On June 16th, 2015, in front of a crowd of supporters, Donald Trump proclaimed: "Save Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security without cuts. Have to do it." But today, nearly two years later, the truth rears its ugly head. Under Donald Trump's proposed budget, $800 billion will be stripped from Medicaid, which could cut off benefits for about 10 million Americans. Donald Trump's budget breaks his promise to the people who voted for him and betrays working people, senior citizens, people with disabilities, and young people. Tens of millions of Americans who rely on Medicaid and other programs slated for the chopping block will suffer under the Trump plan, and all so Donald can cut taxes for millionaires and billionaires -- and himself. Budgets are moral documents, but Donald's proposal is simply immoral. We all need to stand together against it before Republicans in Congress try to write it into law. Add your voice right now: "" Thanks, Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Donald Trump bullied his way to the presidency and now he's doing it again to repeal Obamacare.

The White House is deliberately causing chaos in Obamacare exchanges by threatening to withhold billions in payments to insurers -- make no mistake why: **Trump bragged to the _Wall Street Journal_ that "Democrats will start calling me" to negotiate if turmoil ensues.**

And sure enough, we're already seeing the consequences of Trump's sabotage starting to play out.

Without the payment assistance, insurers are planning to spike premiums (by 19%!) and withdraw from the marketplace, effectively ballooning costs for millions of Americans.

[**Don 't let Trump get away with this calculated political maneuver. Chip in $1 to help fund our health care ads that fight back Obamacare repeal.**](https://secure.dscc. That's why we're running a six-figure ad buy targeting vulnerable Republicans who voters want to replace for supporting Obamacare repeal.

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: This is a pivotal week for health care
body:
This plan would gut Medicaid funding by $610 billion, leaving low income children, the disabled, and seniors without health care.
#
Friends,
Donald Trump just released a budget that puts health care for our country's poorest communities on the chopping block. This plan would gut Medicaid funding by $610 billion, leaving low income children, the disabled, and seniors without health care. The effects on our public health system would be a disaster.
We are in the midst of an opioid epidemic, and the Republicans' biggest priority is to give tax breaks to the pharmaceutical industry. These corporations have flooded our communities with highly addictive prescription drugs, yet haven't borne any of the responsibility for the damage they've caused. Stripping health care from people who have nowhere else to turn is a cruel sham to increase corporate profitability on the backs of the most vulnerable.
**[Our Revolution is fighting to end this corporate profiteering. Health care is a human right, and it should never, ever be cut. Join our efforts to save Medicaid and build a Medicare for All system with a $5 donation today.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d6f/43f17890/d9687036/620387ca/435877009/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=em170523-full")**
Health care budgets aren't just about line items and arithmetic. The decisions on how we fund our health care system mean life or death to the millions of people who rely on Medicaid. Congress has ignored the calls for universal coverage, which a majority of Americans want. Instead, they're propping up insurance and pharmaceutical industries whose businesses are predicated on profit, not prevention.
It is morally wrong to take away health care from people who are already at risk of falling into the cracks. The Trump administration and Republicans in Congress don't care that people might have to choose between groceries and prescriptions, or that people can't pay for a visit to the doctor. **[We need a health care system that works for everyone, regardless of income, age, or socioeconomic status. Can you contribute $5 to Our Revolution to push back against the GOP assault on public health? Your donation will ensure we can run an organizing campaign in multiple states as we build up a national effort around Medicare for All.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d6f/43f17890/d9687036/620387ca/435877009/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=em170523-full")**
We have to do more than stand against harmful policies. People want to hear a positive, progressive vision for the future of our country, and that's what we're doing, from supporting candidates that believe health care is a human right, to bills in state legislatures that would make it so. We've defeated the AHCA once before--with your help, I believe we can do it again.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution

**_New York Times: It 's Time to Worry about Health Care in the Senate_**
Team --

Did you see the latest from _the New York Times_ on the Senate health care debate this morning?

> _" While the rest of the country has been transfixed by Trumpian chaos, members of the Senate have spent the last two weeks talking about taking health insurance from millions of Americans."_
The _Times_ article goes on to explain that Senate Republicans are counting on distracting the American people with the latest White House chaos in order to rush through a bill that would be disastrous for working families.

That's where you come in -- as the _Times_ article says, the only hope for stopping this harmful bill is by loudly calling attention to its damaging effects.

[**We 're running ads now calling out the high cost of the GOP repeal plan but we need to do more. subject: no one is spared

body:
DONALD TRUMP HAS RELEASED HIS BUDGET PROPOSAL AND IT SMASHES HARDWORKING AMERICANS **DONALD TRUMP HAS RELEASED HIS BUDGET PROPOSAL AND IT SMASHES HARDWORKING AMERICANS**

**JUST TAKE A LOOK AT A FEW OF THE CUTS:**

* Includes the atrocious Trump/Republican Health Care ("WealthCare") bill, and increases the total Medicaid cut from over $800 billion to over $1.4 trillion -- which will be devastating to the working poor, people with disabilities and millions of seniors in nursing homes. It also goes after the Children's Health Insurance Program.

* Cuts antipoverty programs like the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), which help provide meals to the children of the working poor and children whose parents can't find work.

* Cuts Social Security Disability Insurance, vital Maryland transportation projects, veterans housing programs, lifesaving medical research (a $6 billion cut to the NIH), and wipes out the EPA's Chesapeake Bay Protection Program.

_**And that's just the beginning ...** _ Virtually no one is spared by this budget. Not the poor and vulnerable who can't afford health care, not the elderly who receive food assistance through Meals on Wheels, not college students who need help paying for their education. No one is spared EXCEPT the very wealthy. Under the Trump budget, millionaires will get an average annual tax cut of $50,000.

[**Add your name now to stand against this reckless plan to gut critical programs for working people, while boosting the wealthiest with a giant tax cut in the GOP/Trumpcare package.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91be8/70cdc2ba/475fa07f/397f07d/3459807095/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-say-no-to-trump-budget?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+now+to+stand+against+this+&utm_campaign=em052417&source=em052417")

Despite his populist campaign rhetoric, Donald Trump's priorities have been crystal clear: big tax cuts for the wealthy, and massive cuts to programs that support hardworking people in Maryland and nationwide.

Trump's budget is the most draconian, extremist budget proposal in decades. It will shred America's safety net and eliminate critical long-term investments in our future.

That's why we have to stop it.

[**Stand with hardworking Americans and say "NO" to the reckless Trump budget by instantly adding your name to Chris Van Hollen 's petition. Who will stand up for our values if we don't? Act now. **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91be8/70cdc2ba/475fa07f/397f07a/3459807095/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-say-no-to-trump-budget?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Stand+with+hardworking+Americans+and+say&utm_campaign=em052417&source=em052417")

name: Leila McDowell, EMILY's List
subject: [Signature needed] Stand with Planned Parenthood >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c797f/24c69fd9/e8fb6cac/18e4cfa7/3370156292/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE532N_digital_email_20170523_TrumpDefundPP_inact&source=WQENE532N_digital_email_20170523_TrumpDefundPP_inact")
---

Peter,

President Trump's 2018 budget came out last night, and it's worse than we even imagined.

Trump wants to cut ALL federal funding for Planned Parenthood -- going further than any other president has to gut their funding.

And when we say all funding, we mean everything from funding for cervical and breast cancer screenings to Zika prevention, HIV/AIDS testing, sexual assault prevention, STI prevention, and children's health programs.

If Trump gets his way, federal funding for these Planned Parenthood programs will be GONE.

**[We have to fight back as hard and as fast as we can. Add your name to stand with Planned Parenthood.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c797f/24c69fd9/e8fb6cac/18e4cfa0/3370156292/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170523_email_StandPP?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+We+have+to+fight+back+as+hard+and+as+fas&utm_campaign=WQENE532N_digital_email_20170523_TrumpDefundPP_inact&source=WQENE532N_digital_email_20170523_TrumpDefundPP_inact")**

No president has ever tried to exclude one provider from the entire federal budget before. And what's worse, he's going after an organization that provides critical resources to communities in need.

Planned Parenthood is the nation's most trusted provider of reproductive health care, and it serves 2.5 million patients nationwide. Fifty-four percent of its clinics are located in underserved areas. It's the ONLY safety-net family-planning provider in over 20 percent of American counties.

What happens to the women and families in those communities when their Planned Parenthood clinic has to close because of President Trump's budget? It's clear that Trump neither knows nor cares.
